Stress-Tested Governance. Before Reality Demands It.
Auracelle Simulation Suite · 2026

Auracelle AI Governance Labs builds proprietary wargaming simulations that stress-test AI governance policy, cyber resilience, standards verification, and cognitive warfare readiness — revealing exactly where institutions fail before they discover it in the real world.

Platform Modules
The Simulation Suite

Each simulation targets a distinct failure mode — from policy collapse to cognitive warfare to standards verification breakdown. Together they form a unified platform for stress-tested governance: revealing where institutions fail before reality demands it.

E-AGPO-HT · Stress Point · AI Governance War Game
Module Alpha · Active · BSU Research
Auracelle presents: Stress Point
A Contested Negotiation Table Simulation for AI Governance · Bath Spa University Doctoral Instrument

An asynchronous wargaming simulation where Agentic AI and human players negotiate real governance scenarios at a congested decision table. An AI Adjudicator scores every move; a Red Team applies adversarial pressure. Stress Point reveals exactly where policy collapses — and why.

Agentic AI moves generated live via Claude Sonnet 4 Policy Owner agent
Human and AI actors negotiate at a congested multilateral table simultaneously
Red Team injects 9 crisis types: AI incident, great power veto, classified leak
AI Adjudicator scores coalition strength, defection signals, and policy resilience
Failure score benchmarked against EU AI Act, GDPR, California SB-53
Policy WargamingRed TeamingAgentic AIBSU ResearchStress-Tested Governance
Launch Simulation ↗
E-AGPO-HT · Cyber Governance · Geneva Cyber Week 2026
Module Beta · Geneva Cyber Week 2026
Auracelle Orion
Cyber Governance · Security Supply Chain Resilience

A decision-quality wargaming simulation for cyber governance and supply chain resilience. Players navigate real-time cyber attack scenarios targeting security supply chains, manage active incidents, and apply the Supply Chain Immune Operational Methodology — revealing grey zone outcomes.

Security supply chain stress-testing: SBOM visibility, vendor concentration, grey-market exposure
7 cyber attack scenarios including SolarWinds-class software supply chain compromise
Supply Chain Immune Operational Methodology counters cascade failures in real time
Grey zone outcome scoring with cascade threshold detection across four domain dimensions
Regulatory tracker: EO 14028, NIS2, CISA KEV, EU CRA live compliance obligations
Cyber GovernanceSupply ChainGrey ZoneNIS2EO 14028
Launch Simulation ↗
E-AGPO-HT + E-AGSO-HT · Non-Proliferation
Module Gamma · IAEA Vienna 2026
Auracelle Lyra
Proliferation Compliance · Verification · Enforcement · Non-Proliferation

An assurance and standards resilience simulation for nuclear stockpile governance. Players conduct proliferation compliance audits, execute IAEA verification protocols, and determine whether enforcement actions protect non-proliferation regimes under stress.

Proliferation compliance audits across 20 real INFCIRC actors including Iran, DPRK
Verification protocols for nuclear, biotech, space, and frontier AI domains
Enforcement outcome modelling — treaty compliance to sanctions regimes
Live IAEA PRIS reactor data and World Bank governance indicators
NuclearNon-ProliferationIAEAINFCIRC
Launch Simulation ↗
E-IAIG-HT · Cognitive Warfare · Local Deployment
Module Delta · Local Deployment
Auracelle Delphi
Cognitive Warfare · Neurotechnology · Cognitive Foresight

A cognitive foresight simulation for neurotechnology governance and cognitive warfare. Players navigate BCI-enabled threat scenarios, veracity classification challenges, and the Liar's Dividend — where synthetic and authentic information become indistinguishable.

Cognitive foresight engine maps threat trajectories across 6 emerging domains
BCI ransomware and neurotechnology governance scenarios
Liar's Dividend bifurcation — where disinformation and truth converge
GESDA Anticipation Observatory integration, NATO HFM Amsterdam taxonomy
Cognitive WarfareBCINeuroTechGESDA
Local Deployment Only
E-AGPO-HT · Actor Network · AlphaFold-style
Module Epsilon · Streamlit · Research Baseline
Auracelle Bach
Actor Network · Multi-Agent Governance · Research Baseline

The foundational AI governance simulation — an actor network engine mapping connections between allied actors, adversaries, think-tanks, academia, technology and industry, and government and military. Bach reveals how influence flows under governance stress.

AlphaFold-style 3D actor graph with structural relationship and bond confidence
All six actor types modelled simultaneously in rotating 3D space
Multi-Agent RL optimises governance strategies across thousands of sessions
Research baseline for doctoral comparison across the full Auracelle suite
Actor NetworkMARLAcademicResearch Baseline
Launch Simulation ↗
E-AGPO-HT · Space Domain · WinterStorm2030
Module Zeta · Local Deployment · WinterStorm2030 · NATO STO SAS-219
Auracelle Polaris
Space Governance · Orbital Resilience · WinterStorm2030 · NATO STO SAS-219 R4/R7

A specialised simulation for the space domain — stress-testing orbital dependencies, satellite communications governance, and ASAT weapons policy. Developed in direct alignment with WinterStorm2030 and NATO STO SAS-219 subgroups covering disruptive capabilities and diplomacy.

LEO, MEO, and GEO orbital environment modelling with live debris tracking
SATCOM dependency and dual-use satellite governance scenarios
ASAT weapons policy stress-testing and space domain awareness
WinterStorm2030 Game 2 "The Cut-Off" architectural alignment confirmed
NATO STO SAS-219 R4 (Disruptive Capabilities) and R7 (Diplomacy) integration
Space GovernanceOrbital DebrisWinterStorm2030NATO STOASATSATCOM
Local Deployment Only
E-AGPO-HT · Arctic High North · NATO STO SAS-219
Module Eta · NATO STO SAS-219 R4 / R5 / R7 · Local / NATO Deployment
Auracelle WinterStorm2030
Arctic High North · Hybrid Warfare · Diplomatic Negotiation · NATO STO SAS-219

Multi-stakeholder wargaming instrument for Arctic governance and hybrid warfare, developed in alignment with NATO STO SAS-219. Players negotiate resource access, sovereign claims, and escalation thresholds across High North scenarios — with a Concession Engine modelling diplomatic compromise under pressure.

Greenland, Russia, Norway, China and United States stakeholder nodes across Legal, Military, Civil Society, and Diplomatic roles
Concession Engine models adaptive diplomatic compromise under escalating conditions
Three concession types: Access, Resource, and Narrative / Legal
Submitted to NATO DIANA Decision Superiority Challenge — confirmation received
SAS-219 R4 (Disruptive Capabilities), R5 (Digitally-Enabled Wargaming) and R7 (Diplomacy) integration
Arctic High NorthHybrid WarfareNATO STOConcession EngineDiplomatic NegotiationNATO DIANA
Local / NATO Deployment
Proprietary Frameworks
Three Original Analytical Frameworks

Each simulation is powered by a proprietary framework developed by Grace-Alice Evans at Auracelle AI Governance Labs. Full methodology documentation is available to institutional partners and verified researchers under NDA.

Primary Framework
E-AGPO-HT
AI Governance Policy Optimization — Stress Point, Orion, Bach, Polaris

The primary wargaming intelligence framework underpinning Stress Point, both Orion simulations, Bach, and Polaris. Designed to quantify governance coordination failure under adversarial conditions, cross-stakeholder incentive misalignment, and cascading institutional dependencies.

Governance coordination failure modelling
Adversarial pressure and defection detection
Cascade threshold monitoring
Multi-stakeholder incentive analysis
Proprietary IP · Auracelle AI Governance Labs · Evans 2024–2026
Standards Framework
E-AGSO-HT
AI Governance Standards Optimization — Lyra (dual-framework)

A parallel framework adapted for assurance and standards verification in high-risk domains. Evaluates whether standards regimes maintain integrity under institutional stress, constrained information, and adversarial pressure. Unique to Lyra — the only dual-framework instrument in the suite.

Proliferation compliance auditing
Verification and enforcement outcome modelling
High-risk domain adaptation
Dual E-AGPO-HT + E-AGSO-HT configuration
Proprietary IP · Auracelle AI Governance Labs · Evans 2024–2026
Cognitive Warfare Framework · Standalone
E-IAIG-HT
Intelligence-Augmented Institutional Governance — Delphi only

Purpose-built for cognitive warfare, neurotechnology governance, and AI-augmented intelligence operations. Applied exclusively to Auracelle Delphi. Incorporates cognitive foresight modelling, BCI threat scenarios, veracity classification, and the Liar's Dividend bifurcation mechanic developed following NATO HFM Amsterdam 2025.

Proprietary IP · Auracelle AI Governance Labs · Evans 2025–2026
